issues.detail: The skill documentation does not cover error scenarios and edge cases comprehensively.
The skill is specific to Elixir/Phoenix and does not generalize across different AI agent platforms.

scenarios.name: Articles context with changeset and preload
scenarios.rationale: Phoenix/Ecto patterns (schema, changeset, contexts, preload) are mainstream so baseline gets most of the rubric; treatment matches the documented context pattern with explicit where/order_by/preload pipeline exactly.

scenarios.name: LiveView with debounced search
scenarios.rationale: Baseline knows mount/handle_event shape but typically misses phx-debounce and the live route helper specifics; treatment uses phx-change/phx-debounce and the live router macro as documented.
